title: Dockerize a Web App
description: Take a simple Node.js or Python application and write a multi-stage Dockerfile for it. Ensure the final image is optimized and secure.

title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline that automatically lints, tests, and builds a project on every pull request to the main branch.

title: Kubernetes Web Cluster
description: Deploy a scalable web application on a local Kubernetes cluster (like minikube). Configure deployments, services, ingress controllers, and basic horizontal pod autoscaling.
